title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Nine Asia-Pacific markets are operationalizing VASP licensing, custody standards, and AML supervision frameworks through September, creating the region's densest compliance procurement window since Singapore's MiCA-equivalent regime launched. Australia moves from implementation to enforcement on Travel Rule while Korea develops institutional custody infrastructure and Philippines enforces ongoing VASP registration deadlines.
